notes: Core breakout mechanics work but ball.speed is never initialized on the ball object (only set in launchBall via ball.speed which is undefined, causing NaN velocity after first paddle hit), attract mode uses ball.speed=0 check incorrectly, and paddle collision speed accumulation breaks after the first bounce making the ball freeze or behave erratically.

A fatal flaw where 'ball.speed' is never initialized causes the ball's velocity to become NaN on the first paddle hit, completely breaking the game; additionally, releasing keyboard controls snaps the paddle back to the mouse position.

Core Breakout structure is present, but a major ball-speed initialization bug after serve and mixed mouse/keyboard paddle behavior materially hurt gameplay despite decent visuals and no obvious fatal crash points.
